faq.question: Is JustPorn.ai free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, you can start for free with 10 generations. Premium plans unlock unlimited creation and advanced features like HD quality, video generation, and priority processing.

faq.question: What content can I generate?
faq.answer: JustPorn.ai creates AI-generated adult images and videos in realistic, anime, and fantasy styles. All content is fictional and AI-generated. We do not allow content depicting real individuals without consent.

faq.question: Is my privacy protected?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We use advanced encryption and never share your data. Your generations are private by default, and we do not store any personal information beyond what's needed for your account.

faq.question: How do tokens work?
faq.answer: Each generation costs tokens. Free users get 10 tokens to start. Paid plans include monthly token allowances (200-500 depending on your plan). Additional tokens can be purchased anytime from your account.

faq.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
faq.answer: Yes, you can cancel anytime from your account settings. No questions asked. If you cancel during a trial, you won't be charged. Annual plans can be cancelled for a prorated refund within 30 days.

faq.question: What payment methods are accepted?
faq.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PayPal, and cryptocurrency (Bitcoin, Ethereum) for maximum privacy and discretion.

faq.question: Are the generated images realistic?
faq.answer: Our AI produces high-quality realistic images, plus anime and fantasy styles. Results improve constantly with model updates. The 'Realistic' mode uses state-of-the-art diffusion models for lifelike results.

faq.question: Is there a mobile app?
faq.answer: JustPorn.ai works perfectly on mobile browsers with a responsive design optimized for touch. A native app is coming soon for iOS and Android with push notifications and offline browsing.
